name: Colors Domination
description: Colors Domination is a free leisure puzzle online game played on PuzzleGame for boys. In the game, there are many squares of different colors combined together for you to fill in the same colors. The goal is to fill the entire board with one color. I guess it's easy for you. Are you ready to try it now? Play it on Mobile, Tablet, or Desktop.
tags: 3D, Android, Block, Boy, Brain, Coloring, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Online, Puzzle
